turn1_code:
def render_simple_post(title: str, content: str):
    """
    Prints a simple post with a title and content.

    Args:
        title: The title of the post.
        content: The content of the post.
    """
    print(f"Title: {title}")
    print(f"Content: {content}")

        author: The author of the post.
    """
    print(f"Title: {title}")
    print(f"Content: {content}")
    print(f"Written by {author}")
